use_cases: Displaying team members or collaborators in a grid layout
Showing user groups and participant lists in social applications
Representing commenters or contributors in discussion threads
Building user attribution and credit sections for content platforms
Creating contact lists and member directories with animated hover effects
ai_summary: An animated avatar group component featuring staggered entrance animations, hover scale effects with spring physics, and a dark/light mode toggle. The component renders multiple user profile images with overlapping circular styling and a subtle grid background pattern, making it ideal for displaying team members, collaborators, or user groups in SaaS and content platforms.
